feature_justification.claim economics: billed amount and high-bill flags represent financial exposure known at claim creation.
feature_justification.patient and encounter context: demographics, department, visit type, doctor, chronic status, and LOS describe claim complexity.
feature_justification.payer history: prior provider rejection rate uses only earlier claims and supports payer-risk estimation.
feature_justification.timing: billing lag and visit/billing calendar fields support payment-cycle and process-pattern learning.
feature_justification.quality flags: temporal anomaly and outlier flags preserve known data-reliability signals without using claim outcomes.
